title: Chemicals and your health - Canada.ca
content:
## Chemicals and your health
Information on chemicals and the health effects of exposure, vulnerable populations, product safety, chemical contaminants in food and measuring exposure.

## Services and information

### Health effects of chemical exposure
Explore the potential health effects of exposure to chemicals and ways to reduce your risk.

### Measuring your exposure to chemicals
Learn how Canada measures Canadians' exposure to common chemicals.

### Chemical contaminants in food
Learn about food-borne chemical contaminants. Also find out how Canada assesses their health effects and reduces the risks to Canadians.

### Chemical and pollutant list
Search for a chemical or pollutant to learn more about its effects on your health and how to reduce your risk.
- Environment and Climate Change Canada
